results.title: Congress’ Ethanol U-turn and the Opposition’s credibility crisis
results.description: Politics often thrives on selective memory. What is defended in government is frequently denounced in opposition. Few issues illustrate this contradiction better than the recent debate over ethanol-blended fuel and the broader criticism directed at Prime Minister Narendra Modi’s development agenda. Two videos circulated widely on social media this week prompted this reflection. One features... The post Congress’ Ethanol U-turn and the Opposition’s credibility crisis appeared first on OrangeNews9 . results.title: Why BTS agreed to perform at the FIFA World Cup 2026 halftime show without getting paid? Here's why it's more than a paycheck
results.description: BTS will headline the FIFA World Cup 2026 final halftime show without an appearance fee, supporting the FIFA Global Citizen Education Fund. The performance aligns with the group's charitable values, offers unmatched global exposure, marks FIFA history's first halftime show, highlights their reunion after military service, and adds another milestone to their legacy alongside global music icons.

results.title: Why was Torbjorn Heggem goal disallowed during Norway vs England FIFA World Cup 2026 Quarterfinal?
results.description: Norway thought it had the lead for the second time in the quarterfinal but its joy was cut short after a VAR check.
